name: Stuffed Green Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cut each pepper lengthwise in half and remove seeds and membranes.
3. Cook peppers in boiling salted water for 5 minutes, then drain and set aside.
4. In a large skillet, cook ground beef until brown, removing excess fat.
5. Add onion and celery, stir to combine.
6. Stir in tomato sauce, salt, garlic salt, Worcestershire sauce, instant rice, and water.
7. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer covered for 5 minutes.
8. Spoon meat filling into each pepper half evenly.
9. Cover pan with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
10. Remove foil and top peppers with remaining tomato sauce.
11. Bake an additional 5 minutes.
End of recipe.
